objectives: Formulate a complete, unambiguous rule set for a simple game
Define win/lose conditions, scoring, turn/phase structure, and edge cases
Demonstrate the game flow using example playthroughs
learning_path.title: Core Game Rules: From Concept to Formal Rule Set

objectives: Create gambling games concepts with clear player actions and outcomes
Specify payout tables, odds, and constraints as formal rules
Demonstrate sample rounds to validate clarity and completeness
learning_path.title: Gambling Game Concepts: Designing Fair, Testable Mechanics

objectives: Implement core gameplay loops and state transitions in code
Translate a written rule set into deterministic logic
Structure code to support iteration on rules and parameters
learning_path.title: Programming Foundations for Gameplay Systems

objectives: Set up a repository and commit strategy for rapid iteration
Use branching to experiment with rule changes safely
Resolve conflicts and maintain a stable mainline prototype
learning_path.title: Versioned Prototyping Workflow

objectives: Create a minimal playable prototype in Unity or Unreal
Map game rules to engine objects and update loops
Demonstrate the prototype to validate the intended rules
learning_path.title: Engine Setup and Prototype Implementation (Unity/Unreal)

objectives: Implement gameplay interactions using Lua or Blueprints
Expose tunable parameters for rules, payouts, and pacing
Iterate on rules quickly without recompiling core systems
learning_path.title: Gameplay Scripting Layer (Lua/Blueprints)

objectives: Refactor prototype logic into component-based systems
Separate data from behavior to improve iteration speed
Define system boundaries for rules, UI flow, and simulation
learning_path.title: Game Architecture Patterns: Component-Based Design and ECS

objectives: Use vectors and matrices for movement and transforms
Apply quaternions for stable rotations
Validate math-driven behaviors with in-engine demonstrations
learning_path.title: 3D Math for Gameplay and Simulation

objectives: Implement collision-driven interactions aligned with rules
Configure rigidbody dynamics for predictable outcomes
Debug common physics issues affecting gameplay fairness
learning_path.title: Game Physics: Collision and Rigidbody Dynamics

objectives: Use the graphics pipeline to support clear gameplay feedback
Implement simple shaders for highlighting states and outcomes
Optimize visual effects to maintain stable frame time
learning_path.title: Real-Time Rendering: Pipeline and Shaders for Game Feedback

objectives: Profile CPU/GPU hotspots in the prototype
Optimize update loops, allocations, and rendering costs
Verify that rule logic remains correct after optimization
learning_path.title: Debugging and Profiling: Performance Optimization for Real-Time Play

objectives: Design a client-server model that enforces game rules
Replicate game state changes deterministically
Demonstrate multiplayer rounds and validate consistency
learning_path.title: Multiplayer Networking: Client-Server and Replication of Rules

matched_occupation.description: Gambling games designers design innovative gambling, betting and lottery games. They determine the design, gaming rules or structure of a game. Gambling games designers may also demonstrate the game to individuals.
matched_occupation.label: gambling games designer
